name: Microsoft Defender Disabling Attempt via PowerShell
description: An attempt to disable Microsoft Defender via PowerShell is detected.

prompts.prompt: Investigate the security event: 'Microsoft Defender Disabling Attempt via PowerShell'. Event details: {event_details}

parameters.name: event_details
parameters.description: Details of the detected security event, including the original query information: `norm_id=WinServer event_id=4104 script_block="Set-MpPreference -DisableRealtimeMonitoring $true"`.
